purpose: Controlled KB refresh strategy for CRS Blueprint
runtime_generation_policy: Generation uses curated KB and registered source metadata. It must not depend on live official-site fetches or automatically rewrite compliance facts.
refresh_flow: Check source availability and metadata outside the generation path
Flag unavailable or changed sources for human review
Update jurisdiction facts only after review/sign-off
technical_diagnostics_location: Generation diagnostics / source-health report; not a blocker if deterministic generation succeeds
